parts: The only time this award was granted to more than a single person was when the Bechers won it in 2004. This award, established by the founder of a Swedish camera company, has been won by other Germans, such as Wolfgang Tillmans and Robert Häusser.
This photographer is possibly the most famous student of Hilla and Bernd Becher. This man’s Rhein II is the most expensive photograph ever sold.
Gerhard Richter, a contemporary of the Bechers in Düsseldorf, created the painting that this band used for the cover of their album Daydream Nation. Kim Gordon and Thurston Moore founded this band.
